arabicText: يَا الرَّحْمَنُ ارْحَمْنَا بِرَحْمَتِكَ الْوَاسِعَةِ وَأَلْطُفْ بِنَا فِي الْقَضَاءِ وَالْأَقْدَارِ بِفَضْلِكَ [1]
latinTransliteration: Yā Ar-Raḥmān irḥamnā bi-raḥmatikal-wāsi'ati wal-ṭuf binā fīl-qaḍā'i wal-aqdār bi-faḍlik (1)
englishTranslation: O The Beneficent! Please have mercy on us with Your vast mercy and show us gentleness in divine decrees and destiny, by Your grace (Stanza 1)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Yëreem ki! Nanga yërëm nu ci sa yërmënde ju yaatu ja te laabal sunuy dund ci say dogal, ci sa ngënel (Wers 1)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ يِࣺرِيمْ كِ! نَنْجَ يِٜrِٜrِمْ نُ سِ سَ يِٜrْمِينْدِ جُ يَاتُ جَ تِ لَابَلْ سُنُيْ دُنْدْ سِ سَيْ دُجَلْ سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ [1]

arabicText: يَا الرَّحِيمُ ارْحَمْنَا بِرَحْمَتِكَ الْوَاسِعَةِ وَأَلْطُفْ بِنَا فِي الْقَضَاءِ وَالْأَقْدَارِ يَا كَرِيمُ [2]
latinTransliteration: Yā Ar-Raḥīm irḥamnā bi-raḥmatikal-wāsi'ati wal-ṭuf binā fīl-qaḍā'i wal-aqdār yā Karīm (2)
englishTranslation: O The Merciful! Please have mercy on us with Your vast mercy and show us gentleness in divine decrees and destiny, O Generous (Stanza 2)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Boroom yërmënde ju yaatu ja! Nanga yërëm nu ci sa yërmënde ju yaatu ja te laabal sunuy dund ci say dogal, yaw Ku Yaatu ki (Wers 2)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ بُرُومْ يِࣺرْمِينْدِ جُ يَاتُ جَ! نَنْجَ يِٜrِٜrِمْ نُ سِ سَ يِٜrْمِينْدِ جُ يَاتُ جَ تِ لَابَلْ سُنُيْ دُنْدْ سِ سَيْ دُجَلْ يَوْ كُ يَاتُ كِ [2]

arabicText: يَا الْمَلِكُ ثَبِّتْ قُلُوبَنَا عَلَى الْإِيمَانِ وَأَعِزَّ مَقَامَنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ عَاجِلاً [3]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Malik thabbit qulūbanā ‘alal-īmāni wa a‘izz maqāmanā fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah ‘ājilan (3)
englishTranslation: O The King! Please make our hearts firm upon true faith and elevate our status in this world and the next, swiftly (Stanza 3)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Buur bi! Nanga dëgëral sunuy xol ca ngëm te kaweal sunu daraja ca kaw suuf ak àllaxira, gaaw (Wers 3)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ بُورْ بِ! نَنْجَ دِٜجِٜrَلْ سُنُيْ خُلْ سَ نْجِٜنْ تِ كُوِلْ سُنُ دَرَجَ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ جَاوْ [3]

arabicText: يَا الْقُدُّوسُ ثَبِّتْ قُلُوبَنَا عَلَى الْإِيمَانِ وَأَعِزَّ مَقَامَنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ بِتَيْسِيرِكَ [4]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Quddūs thabbit qulūbanā ‘alal-īmāni wa a‘izz maqāmanā fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah bi-taysīrik (4)
englishTranslation: O The Most Sacred! Please make our hearts firm upon true faith and elevate our status in this world and the next, with Your facilitation (Stanza 4)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Sell ki! Nanga dëgëral sunuy xol ca ngëm te kaweal sunu daraja ca kaw suuf ak àllaxira, ci sa yombal (Wers 4)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ سِلْ كِ! نَنْجَ دِٜجِٜrَلْ سُنُيْ خُلْ سَ نْجِٜنْ تِ كُوِلْ سُنُ دَرَجَ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ سِ سَ يُومْبَلْ [4]

arabicText: يَا السَّلَامُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا حَيُّ [5]
latinTransliteration: Yā As-Salām anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Ḥayy (5)
englishTranslation: O The Source of Peace! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O Ever-Living (Stanza 5)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Jamu ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, yaw Ku Dund ki (Wers 5)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ جَمُ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ يَوْ كُ دُنْدْ كِ [5]

arabicText: يَا الْمُؤْمِنُ احْفَظْنَا مِنْ كُلِّ سُوءٍ وَمَكْرٍ وَاكْفِنَا شَرَّ الْحَاسِدِينَ وَالْأَعْدَاءِ يَا رَبَّنَا [6]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Mu'min iḥfaẓnā min kulli sū'in wa makrin wa-kfinā sharral-ḥāsidīna wal-a‘dā' yā Rabbanā (6)
englishTranslation: O Inspirer of Faith! Please protect us from every evil and plotting, and suffice us against the envious and adversaries, O our Lord (Stanza 6)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku dëgëral ngëm gi! Nanga aar nu ci bépp tookoñ walla pexe, te faddal nu noon yi di nu iñaané ak mbooloo, sunu Boroom (Wers 6)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ دِࣺجِࣺرَلْ نْجِࣺمْ جِ! نَنْجَ آرْ نُ سِ بِيقْ تُوكُنْ وَلَّ پِخِ تِ فَدَّلْ نُ نُونْ يِ دِ نُ اِنيَانِ اَكْ مْبُولُو سُنُ بُرُومْ [6]

arabicText: يَا الْمُهَيْمِنُ احْفَظْنَا مِنْ كُلِّ سُوءٍ وَمَكْرٍ وَاكْفِنَا شَرَّ الْحَاسِدِينَ وَالْأَعْدَاءِ يَا اللَّهُ [7]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Muhaymin iḥfaẓnā min kulli sū'in wa makrin wa-kfinā sharral-ḥāsidīna wal-a‘dā' yā Allāh (7)
englishTranslation: O The Guardian! Please protect us from every evil and plotting, and suffice us against the envious and adversaries, O Allah (Stanza 7)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ab Gaar bi! Nanga aar nu ci bépp tookoñ walla pexe, te faddal nu noon yi di nu iñaané ak mbooloo, yā Yàlla (Wers 7)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ اَبْ جَارْ بِ! نَنْجَ آرْ نُ سِ بِيقْ تُوكُنْ وَلَّ پِخِ تِ فَدَّلْ نُ نُونْ يِ دِ نُ اِنيَانِ اَكْ مْبُولُو يَا يَٜلَّ [7]

arabicText: يَا الْعَزِيزُ ثَبِّتْ قُلُوبَنَا عَلَى الْإِيمَانِ وَأَعِزَّ مَقَامَنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ بِفَضْلِكَ [8]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-‘Azīz thabbit qulūbanā ‘alal-īmāni wa a‘izz maqāmanā fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah bi-faḍlik (8)
englishTranslation: O The Almighty! Please make our hearts firm upon true faith and elevate our status in this world and the next, by Your grace (Stanza 8)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Kawe ki! Nanga dëgëral sunuy xol ca ngëm te kaweal sunu daraja ca kaw suuf ak àllaxira, ci sa ngënel (Wers 8)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ كَوِ كِ! نَنْجَ دِٜجِٜrَلْ سُنُيْ خُلْ سَ نْجِٜنْ تِ كُوِلْ سُنُ دَرَجَ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ [8]

arabicText: يَا الْجَبَّارُ ثَبِّتْ قُلُوبَنَا عَلَى الْإِيمَانِ وَأَعِزَّ مَقَامَنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ يَا كَرِيمُ [9]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Jabbār thabbit qulūbanā ‘alal-īmāni wa a‘izz maqāmanā fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah yā Karīm (9)
englishTranslation: O The Compeller! Please make our hearts firm upon true faith and elevate our status in this world and the next, O Generous (Stanza 9)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Kàttanlu ki! Nanga dëgëral sunuy xol ca ngëm te kaweal sunu daraja ca kaw suuf ak àllaxira, yaw Ku Yaatu ki (Wers 9)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كَتَّنْلُ كِ! نَنْجَ دِٜجِٜrَلْ سُنُيْ خُلْ سَ نْجِٜنْ تِ كُوِلْ سُنُ دَرَجَ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ يَوْ كُ يَاتُ كِ [9]

arabicText: يَا الْمُتَكَبِّرُ ثَبِّتْ قُلُوبَنَا عَلَى الْإِيمَانِ وَأَعِزَّ مَقَامَنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ عَاجِلاً [10]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Mutakabbir thabbit qulūbanā ‘alal-īmāni wa a‘izz maqāmanā fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah ‘ājilan (10)
englishTranslation: O The Dominant! Please make our hearts firm upon true faith and elevate our status in this world and the next, swiftly (Stanza 10)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku rëy ki! Nanga dëgëral sunuy xol ca ngëm te kaweal sunu daraja ca kaw suuf ak àllaxira, gaaw (Wers 10)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ رِي كِ! نَنْجَ دِٜجِٜrَلْ سُنُيْ خُلْ سَ نْجِٜنْ تِ كُوِلْ سُنُ دَرَجَ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ جَاوْ [10]

arabicText: يَا الْخَالِقُ أَحْيِ قُلُوبَنَا بِذِكْرِكَ الطَّاهِرِ وَتَوَفَّنَا عَلَى حَقِيقَةِ الْإِيمَانِ بِتَيْسِيرِكَ [11]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Khāliq aḥyi qulūbanā bi-dhikrikat-ṭāhiri wa tawaffanā ‘alā ḥaqīqatil-īmān bi-taysīrik (11)
englishTranslation: O The Creator! Please revive our hearts with Your pure remembrance and cause us to die upon the reality of faith, with Your facilitation (Stanza 11)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Bind ki! Nanga dundal sunuy xol ci sa tudd gu laab ga, te dee lo nu ca dëgg-dëggug ngëm, ci sa yombal (Wers 11)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ بِنْدْ كِ! نَنْجَ دُنْدَلْ سُنُيْ خُلْ سِ سَ تُدْ جُ لَابْ جَ تِ دِ لُ نُ سِ دِٜجّ دِٜجُجْ نْجِٜنْ سِ سَ يُومْبَلْ [11]

arabicText: يَا الْبَارِئُ أَحْيِ قُلُوبَنَا بِذِكْرِكَ الطَّاهِرِ وَتَوَفَّنَا عَلَى حَقِيقَةِ الْإِيمَانِ يَا حَيُّ [12]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Bāri' aḥyi qulūbanā bi-dhikrikat-ṭāhiri wa tawaffanā ‘alā ḥaqīqatil-īmān yā Ḥayy (12)
englishTranslation: O The Evolver! Please revive our hearts with Your pure remembrance and cause us to die upon the reality of faith, O Ever-Living (Stanza 12)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Defar ki! Nanga dundal sunuy xol ci sa tudd gu laab ga, te dee lo nu ca dëgg-dëggug ngëm, yaw Ku Dund ki (Wers 12)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ دِفَرْ كِ! نَنْجَ دُنْدَلْ سُنُيْ خُلْ سِ سَ تُدْ جُ لَابْ جَ تِ دِ لُ نُ سِ دِٜجّ دِٜجُجْ نْجِٜنْ يَوْ كُ دُنْدْ كِ [12]

arabicText: يَا الْمُصَوِّرُ أَحْيِ قُلُوبَنَا بِذِكْرِكَ الطَّاهِرِ وَتَوَفَّنَا عَلَى حَقِيقَةِ الْإِيمَانِ يَا رَبَّنَا [13]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Muṣawwir aḥyi qulūbanā bi-dhikrikat-ṭāhiri wa tawaffanā ‘alā ḥaqīqatil-īmān yā Rabbanā (13)
englishTranslation: O The Flawless Shaper! Please revive our hearts with Your pure remembrance and cause us to die upon the reality of faith, O our Lord (Stanza 13)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Melal ki! Nanga dundal sunuy xol ci sa tudd gu laab ga, te dee lo nu ca dëgg-dëggug ngëm, sunu Boroom (Wers 13)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ مِلَلْ كِ! نَنْجَ دُنْدَلْ سُنُيْ خُلْ سِ سَ تُدْ جُ لَابْ جَ تِ دِ لُ نُ سِ دِٜجّ دِٜجُجْ نْجِٜنْ سُنُ بُرُومْ [13]

arabicText: يَا الْغَفَّارُ اغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا كُلَّهَا وَتُبْ عَلَيْنَا تَوْبَةً نَصُوحًا تُرْضِيكَ يَا اللَّهُ [14]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Ghaffār ighfir lanā dhunūbanā kullahā wa tub ‘alaynā tawbatan naṣūḥan turḍīk yā Allāh (14)
englishTranslation: O The Great Forgiver! Please forgive all of our sins and grant us a sincere repentance that is pleasing to You, O Allah (Stanza 14)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Baale ki! Nanga jegal sunuy bàkkar yépp te tuubal nu tuub gu sell gu lay neex, yā Yàlla (Wers 14)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ بَالِ كِ! نَنْجَ جِجَلْ سُنُيْ بَكَّرْ يِٜپْ تِ تُوبَلْ نُ تُوبْ جُ سِلْ جُ لَيْ نِوخْ يَا يَٜلَّ [14]

arabicText: يَا الْقَهَّارُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ بِفَضْلِكَ [15]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Qahhār anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik bi-faḍlik (15)
englishTranslation: O The All-Subduing! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, by Your grace (Stanza 15)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Daane ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, ci sa ngënel (Wers 15)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ دَانِ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ [15]

arabicText: يَا الْوَهَّابُ ارْزُقْنَا رِزْقًا حَلَالًا طَيِّبًا وَافْتَحْ لَنَا أَبْوَابَ الْفَضْلِ وَالْجُودِ يَا كَرِيمُ [16]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Wahhāb urzuqnā rizqan ḥalālan ṭayyiban wa-ftaḥ lanā abwābal-faḍli wal-jūd yā Karīm (16)
englishTranslation: O The Bestower! Please grant us pure, lawful sustenance and open for us the gates of favor and generosity, O Generous (Stanza 16)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Maye ki! Nanga wërsëgal nu dund gu dagan te rafet, te ubbil nu bunt yu baax ak ngënel, yaw Ku Yaatu ki (Wers 16)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ مَيِ كِ! نَنْجَ وِٜrْسِجَلْ نُ دُنْدْ جُ دَجَنَّ تِ رَفِتْ تِ أُبِّلْ نُ بُنْتْ يُ بَآخْ اَكْ نْجِنِلْ يَوْ كُ يَاتُ كِ [16]

arabicText: يَا الرَّزَّاقُ ارْزُقْنَا رِزْقًا حَلَالًا طَيِّبًا وَافْتَحْ لَنَا أَبْوَابَ الْفَضْلِ وَالْجُودِ عَاجِلاً [17]
latinTransliteration: Yā Ar-Razzāq urzuqnā rizqan ḥalālan ṭayyiban wa-ftaḥ lanā abwābal-faḍli wal-jūd ‘ājilan (17)
englishTranslation: O The Provider! Please grant us pure, lawful sustenance and open for us the gates of favor and generosity, swiftly (Stanza 17)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Wërsëgal ki! Nanga wërsëgal nu dund gu dagan te rafet, te ubbil nu bunt yu baax ak ngënel, gaaw (Wers 17)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ وِࣺرْسِجَلْ كِ! نَنْجَ وِٜrْسِجَلْ نُ دُنْدْ جُ دَجَنَّ تِ رَفِتْ تِ أُبِّلْ نُ بُنْتْ يُ بَآخْ اَكْ نْجِنِلْ جَاوْ [17]

arabicText: يَا الْفَتَّاحُ ارْزُقْنَا رِزْقًا حَلَالًا طَيِّبًا وَافْتَحْ لَنَا أَبْوَابَ الْفَضْلِ وَالْجُودِ بِتَيْسِيرِكَ [18]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Fattāḥ urzuqnā rizqan ḥalālan ṭayyiban wa-ftaḥ lanā abwābal-faḍli wal-jūd bi-taysīrik (18)
englishTranslation: O The Opener! Please grant us pure, lawful sustenance and open for us the gates of favor and generosity, with Your facilitation (Stanza 18)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Ubbi ki! Nanga wërsëgal nu dund gu dagan te rafet, te ubbil nu bunt yu baax ak ngënel, ci sa yombal (Wers 18)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ أُبِّ كِ! نَنْجَ وِٜrْسِجَلْ نُ دُنْدْ جُ دَجَنَّ تِ رَفِتْ تِ أُبِّلْ نُ بُنْتْ يُ بَآخْ اَكْ نْجِنِلْ سِ سَ يُومْبَلْ [18]

arabicText: يَا الْعَلِيمُ ارْزُقْنَا عِلْمًا نَافِعًا وَوِعَاءً طَاهِرًا وَأَنِرْ بَصَائِرَنَا لِنُورِكَ يَا حَيُّ [19]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-‘Alīm urzuqnā ‘ilman nāfi‘an wa wi‘ā'an ṭāhiran wa anir baṣā'iranā li-nūrik yā Ḥayy (19)
englishTranslation: O The All-Knowing! Please provide us with beneficial knowledge, a pure vessel, and illuminate our insights with Your Light, O Ever-Living (Stanza 19)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Xam ki! Nanga jox nu xam-xam buy jëriñ, lool buy laab, te leeral sunuy gisu-gisu ci sa leer, yaw Ku Dund ki (Wers 19)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ خَمْ كِ! نَنْجَ جُخْ نُ خَمْ خَمْ بُيْ جِرِنْ لُولْ بُيْ لَابْ تِ لِيرَلْ سُنُيْ جِسُ جِسُ سِ سَ لِيرْ يَوْ كُ دُنْدْ كِ [19]

arabicText: يَا الْقَابِضُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا رَبَّنَا [20]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Qābiḍ anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Rabbanā (20)
englishTranslation: O The Withholder! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O our Lord (Stanza 20)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Teje ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, sunu Boroom (Wers 20)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ تِجِ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سُنُ بُرُومْ [20]

arabicText: يَا الْبَاسِطُ ارْزُقْنَا رِزْقًا حَلَالًا طَيِّبًا وَافْتَحْ لَنَا أَبْوَابَ الْفَضْلِ وَالْجُودِ يَا اللَّهُ [21]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Bāsiṭ urzuqnā rizqan ḥalālan ṭayyiban wa-ftaḥ lanā abwābal-faḍli wal-jūd yā Allāh (21)
englishTranslation: O The Extender! Please grant us pure, lawful sustenance and open for us the gates of favor and generosity, O Allah (Stanza 21)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Yaatal ki! Nanga wërsëgal nu dund gu dagan te rafet, te ubbil nu bunt yu baax ak ngënel, yā Yàlla (Wers 21)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ يَاتَلْ كِ! نَنْجَ وِٜrْسِجَلْ نُ دُنْدْ جُ دَجَنَّ تِ رَفِتْ تِ أُبِّلْ نُ بُنْتْ يُ بَآخْ اَكْ نْجِنِلْ يَا يَٜلَّ [21]

arabicText: يَا الْخَافِضُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ بِفَضْلِكَ [22]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Khāfiḍ anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik bi-faḍlik (22)
englishTranslation: O The Reducer! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, by Your grace (Stanza 22)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Wācci ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, ci sa ngënel (Wers 22)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ وَاسِّ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ [22]

arabicText: يَا الرَّافِعُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا كَرِيمُ [23]
latinTransliteration: Yā Ar-Rāfi‘ anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Karīm (23)
englishTranslation: O The Exalter! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O Generous (Stanza 23)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Yékkati ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, yaw Ku Yaatu ki (Wers 23)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ يِيكَّتِ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ يَوْ كُ يَاتُ كِ [23]

arabicText: يَا الْمُعِزُّ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ عَاجِلاً [24]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Mu‘izz anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik ‘ājilan (24)
englishTranslation: O The Giver of Honor! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, swiftly (Stanza 24)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Terale ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, gaaw (Wers 24)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ تِرَلِ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ جَاوْ [24]

arabicText: يَا الْمُذِلُّ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ بِتَيْسِيرِكَ [25]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Mudhill anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik bi-taysīrik (25)
englishTranslation: O The Giver of Dishonor! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, with Your facilitation (Stanza 25)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Toroxle ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, ci sa yombal (Wers 25)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ تُرُخْلِ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سِ سَ يُومْبَلْ [25]

arabicText: يَا السَّمِيعُ ارْزُقْنَا عِلْمًا نَافِعًا وَوِعَاءً طَاهِرًا وَأَنِرْ بَصَائِرَنَا لِنُورِكَ يَا حَيُّ [26]
latinTransliteration: Yā As-Samī‘ urzuqnā ‘ilman nāfi‘an wa wi‘ā'an ṭāhiran wa anir baṣā'iranā li-nūrik yā Ḥayy (26)
englishTranslation: O The All-Hearing! Please provide us with beneficial knowledge, a pure vessel, and illuminate our insights with Your Light, O Ever-Living (Stanza 26)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Dégg ki! Nanga jox nu xam-xam buy jëriñ, lool buy laab, te leeral sunuy gisu-gisu ci sa leer, yaw Ku Dund ki (Wers 26)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ دِجْ كِ! نَنْجَ جُخْ نُ خَمْ خَمْ بُيْ جِرِنْ لُولْ بُيْ لَابْ تِ لِيرَلْ سُنُيْ جِسُ جِسُ سِ سَ لِيرْ يَوْ كُ دُنْدْ كِ [26]

arabicText: يَا الْبَصِيرُ ارْزُقْنَا عِلْمًا نَافِعًا وَوِعَاءً طَاهِرًا وَأَنِرْ بَصَائِرَنَا لِنُورِكَ يَا رَبَّنَا [27]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Baṣīr urzuqnā ‘ilman nāfi‘an wa wi‘ā'an ṭāhiran wa anir baṣā'iranā li-nūrik yā Rabbanā (27)
englishTranslation: O The All-Seeing! Please provide us with beneficial knowledge, a pure vessel, and illuminate our insights with Your Light, O our Lord (Stanza 27)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Gis ki! Nanga jox nu xam-xam buy jëriñ, lool buy laab, te leeral sunuy gisu-gisu ci sa leer, sunu Boroom (Wers 27)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ جِسْ كِ! نَنْجَ جُخْ نُ خَمْ خَمْ بُيْ جِرِنْ لُولْ بُيْ لَابْ تِ لِيرَلْ سُنُيْ جِسُ جِسُ سِ سَ لِيرْ سُنُ بُرُومْ [27]

arabicText: يَا الْحَكَمُ اهْدِنَا إِلَى صِرَاطِكَ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ وَأَعِنَّا عَلَى اتِّبَاعِ الْحَقِّ وَالْعَدْلِ يَا اللَّهُ [28]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Ḥakam ihdinā ilā ṣirāṭikal-mustaqīmi wa a‘innā ‘alā-ttibā‘il-ḥaqqi wal-‘adl yā Allāh (28)
englishTranslation: O The Impartial Judge! Please guide us to Your straight path and aid us in following truth and absolute justice, O Allah (Stanza 28)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Boroom àtte bi! Nanga gindi nu ca sa yoon wu jub wa te dëgëral nu ca topp dëgg ak jub, yā Yàlla (Wers 28)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ بُرُومْ اَتِّ بِ! نَنْجَ جِنْدِ نُ سَ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ تِ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نُ سَ تُpْ دِٜجّ اَكْ جُبْ يَا يَٜلَّ [28]

arabicText: يَا الْعَدْلُ اهْدِنَا إِلَى صِرَاطِكَ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ وَأَعِنَّا عَلَى اتِّبَاعِ الْحَقِّ وَالْعَدْلِ بِفَضْلِكَ [29]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-‘Adl ihdinā ilā ṣirāṭikal-mustaqīmi wa a‘innā ‘alā-ttibā‘il-ḥaqqi wal-‘adl bi-faḍlik (29)
englishTranslation: O The Utterly Just! Please guide us to Your straight path and aid us in following truth and absolute justice, by Your grace (Stanza 29)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Jub ki! Nanga gindi nu ca sa yoon wu jub wa te dëgëral nu ca topp dëgg ak jub, ci sa ngënel (Wers 29)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ جُبْ كِ! نَنْجَ جِنْدِ نُ سَ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ تِ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نُ سَ تُpْ دِٜجّ اَكْ جُبْ سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ [29]

arabicText: يَا اللَّطِيفُ ارْحَمْنَا بِرَحْمَتِكَ الْوَاسِعَةِ وَأَلْطُفْ بِنَا فِي الْقَضَاءِ وَالْأَقْدَارِ يَا كَرِيمُ [30]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Laṭīf irḥamnā bi-raḥmatikal-wāsi'ati wal-ṭuf binā fīl-qaḍā'i wal-aqdār yā Karīm (30)
englishTranslation: O The Most Gentle! Please have mercy on us with Your vast mercy and show us gentleness in divine decrees and destiny, O Generous (Stanza 30)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Lëf ki! Nanga yërëm nu ci sa yërmënde ju yaatu ja te laabal sunuy dund ci say dogal, yaw Ku Yaatu ki (Wers 30)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ لِࣺفْ كِ! نَنْجَ يِٜrِٜrِمْ نُ سِ سَ يِٜrْمِينْدِ جُ يَاتُ جَ تِ لَابَلْ سُنُيْ دُنْدْ سِ سَيْ دُجَلْ يَوْ كُ يَاتُ كِ [30]

arabicText: يَا الْخَبِيرُ ارْزُقْنَا عِلْمًا نَافِعًا وَوِعَاءً طَاهِرًا وَأَنِرْ بَصَائِرَنَا لِنُورِكَ عَاجِلاً [31]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Khabīr urzuqnā ‘ilman nāfi‘an wa wi‘ā'an ṭāhiran wa anir baṣā'iranā li-nūrik ‘ājilan (31)
englishTranslation: O The All-Aware! Please provide us with beneficial knowledge, a pure vessel, and illuminate our insights with Your Light, swiftly (Stanza 31)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Teey ki! Nanga jox nu xam-xam buy jëriñ, lool buy laab, te leeral sunuy gisu-gisu ci sa leer, gaaw (Wers 31)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ تِيقْ كِ! نَنْجَ جُخْ نُ خَمْ خَمْ بُيْ جِرِنْ لُولْ بُيْ لَابْ تِ لِيرَلْ سُنُيْ جِسُ جِسُ سِ سَ لِيرْ جَاوْ [31]

arabicText: يَا الْحَلِيمُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ بِتَيْسِيرِكَ [32]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Ḥalīm anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik bi-taysīrik (32)
englishTranslation: O The Forbearing! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, with Your facilitation (Stanza 32)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Muñ ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, ci sa yombal (Wers 32)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ مُنْ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سِ سَ يُومْبَلْ [32]

arabicText: يَا الْعَظِيمُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا حَيُّ [33]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-‘Aẓīm anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Ḥayy (33)
englishTranslation: O The Magnificent! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O Ever-Living (Stanza 33)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Rëy màkka ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, yaw Ku Dund ki (Wers 33)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ رِي مَكَّ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ يَوْ كُ دُنْدْ كِ [33]

arabicText: يَا الْغَفُورُ اغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا كُلَّهَا وَتُبْ عَلَيْنَا تَوْبَةً نَصُوحًا تُرْضِيكَ يَا رَبَّنَا [34]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Ghafūr ighfir lanā dhunūbanā kullahā wa tub ‘alaynā tawbatan naṣūḥan turḍīk yā Rabbanā (34)
englishTranslation: O The All-Forgiving! Please forgive all of our sins and grant us a sincere repentance that is pleasing to You, O our Lord (Stanza 34)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Jegale ki! Nanga jegal sunuy bàkkar yépp te tuubal nu tuub gu sell gu lay neex, sunu Boroom (Wers 34)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ جِجَلِ كِ! نَنْجَ جِجَلْ سُنُيْ بَكَّرْ يِٜپْ تِ تُوبَلْ نُ تُوبْ جُ سِلْ جُ لَيْ نِوخْ سُنُ بُرُومْ [34]

arabicText: يَا الشَّكُورُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا اللَّهُ [35]
latinTransliteration: Yā Ash-Shakūr anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Allāh (35)
englishTranslation: O The Most Appreciative! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O Allah (Stanza 35)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Santante ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, yā Yàlla (Wers 35)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ سَنْتَنْتِ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ يَا يَٜلَّ [35]

arabicText: يَا الْعَلِيُّ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ بِفَضْلِكَ [36]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-‘Alī anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik bi-faḍlik (36)
englishTranslation: O The Sublimely Exalted! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, by Your grace (Stanza 36)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Kawe màkka ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, ci sa ngënel (Wers 36)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ كَوِ مَكَّ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ [36]

arabicText: يَا الْكَبِيرُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا كَرِيمُ [37]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Kabīr anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Karīm (37)
englishTranslation: O The All-Great! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O Generous (Stanza 37)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Màg ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, yaw Ku Yaatu ki (Wers 37)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ مَجْ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ يَوْ كُ يَاتُ كِ [37]

arabicText: يَا الْحَفِيظُ احْفَظْنَا مِنْ كُلِّ سُوءٍ وَمَكْرٍ وَاكْفِنَا شَرَّ الْحَاسِدِينَ وَالْأَعْدَاءِ عَاجِلاً [38]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Ḥafīẓ iḥfaẓnā min kulli sū'in wa makrin wa-kfinā sharral-ḥāsidīna wal-a‘dā' ‘ājilan (38)
englishTranslation: O The Preserver! Please protect us from every evil and plotting, and suffice us against the envious and adversaries, swiftly (Stanza 38)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Lakatu ki! Nanga aar nu ci bépp tookoñ walla pexe, te faddal nu noon yi di nu iñaané ak mbooloo, gaaw (Wers 38)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ لَكَتُ كِ! نَنْجَ آرْ نُ سِ بِيقْ تُوكُنْ وَلَّ پِخِ تِ فَدَّلْ نُ نُونْ يِ دِ نُ اِنيَانِ اَكْ مْبُولُو جَاوْ [38]

arabicText: يَا الْمُقِيتُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ بِتَيْسِيرِكَ [39]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Muqīt anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik bi-taysīrik (39)
englishTranslation: O The Sustainer! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, with Your facilitation (Stanza 39)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Dundal ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, ci sa yombal (Wers 39)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ دُنْدَلْ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سِ سَ يُومْبَلْ [39]

arabicText: يَا الْحَسِيبُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا حَيُّ [40]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Ḥasīb anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Ḥayy (40)
englishTranslation: O The Reckoner! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O Ever-Living (Stanza 40)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Saytu ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, yaw Ku Dund ki (Wers 40)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ سَيْتُ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ يَوْ كُ دُنْدْ كِ [40]

arabicText: يَا الْجَلِيلُ ثَبِّتْ قُلُوبَنَا عَلَى الْإِيمَانِ وَأَعِزَّ مَقَامَنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ يَا رَبَّنَا [41]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Jalīl thabbit qulūbanā ‘alal-īmāni wa a‘izz maqāmanā fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah yā Rabbanā (41)
englishTranslation: O The Majestic! Please make our hearts firm upon true faith and elevate our status in this world and the next, O our Lord (Stanza 41)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Boroom ndam bi! Nanga dëgëral sunuy xol ca ngëm te kaweal sunu daraja ca kaw suuf ak àllaxira, sunu Boroom (Wers 41)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ بُرُومْ نْدَمْ بِ! نَنْجَ دِٜجِٜrَلْ سُنُيْ خُلْ سَ نْجِٜنْ تِ كُوِلْ سُنُ دَرَجَ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ سُنُ بُرُومْ [41]

arabicText: يَا الْكَرِيمُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا اللَّهُ [42]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Karīm anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Allāh (42)
englishTranslation: O The Most Generous! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O Allah (Stanza 42)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Yaatu joxe ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, yā Yàlla (Wers 42)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ يَاتُ جُخِ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ يَا يَٜلَّ [42]

arabicText: يَا الرَّقِيبُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ بِفَضْلِكَ [43]
latinTransliteration: Yā Ar-Raqīb anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik bi-faḍlik (43)
englishTranslation: O The Watchful! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, by Your grace (Stanza 43)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Fekke ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, ci sa ngënel (Wers 43)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ فِكِّ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ [43]

arabicText: يَا الْمُجِيبُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا كَرِيمُ [44]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Mujīb anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Karīm (44)
englishTranslation: O The Responsive! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O Generous (Stanza 44)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Nangu ñaan ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, yaw Ku Yaatu ki (Wers 44)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ نَنْجُ نْيَانْ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ يَوْ كُ يَاتُ كِ [44]

arabicText: يَا الْوَاسِعُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ عَاجِلاً [45]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Wāsi‘ anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik ‘ājilan (45)
englishTranslation: O The All-Encompassing! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, swiftly (Stanza 45)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Yaatu ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, gaaw (Wers 45)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ يَاتُ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ جَاوْ [45]

arabicText: يَا الْحَكِيمُ اهْدِنَا إِلَى صِرَاطِكَ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ وَأَعِنَّا عَلَى اتِّبَاعِ الْحَقِّ وَالْعَدْلِ بِتَيْسِيرِكَ [46]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Ḥakīm ihdinā ilā ṣirāṭikal-mustaqīmi wa a‘innā ‘alā-ttibā‘il-ḥaqqi wal-‘adl bi-taysīrik (46)
englishTranslation: O The All-Wise! Please guide us to Your straight path and aid us in following truth and absolute justice, with Your facilitation (Stanza 46)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Boroom xél bi! Nanga gindi nu ca sa yoon wu jub wa te dëgëral nu ca topp dëgg ak jub, ci sa yombal (Wers 46)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ بُرُومْ خِيلْ بِ! نَنْجَ جِنْدِ نُ سَ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ تِ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نُ سَ تُpْ دِٜجّ اَكْ جُبْ سِ سَ يُومْبَلْ [46]

arabicText: يَا الْوَدُودُ ارْحَمْنَا بِرَحْمَتِكَ الْوَاسِعَةِ وَأَلْطُفْ بِنَا فِي الْقَضَاءِ وَالْأَقْدَارِ يَا حَيُّ [47]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Wadūd irḥamnā bi-raḥmatikal-wāsi'ati wal-ṭuf binā fīl-qaḍā'i wal-aqdār yā Ḥayy (47)
englishTranslation: O The Most Loving! Please have mercy on us with Your vast mercy and show us gentleness in divine decrees and destiny, O Ever-Living (Stanza 47)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Sobb ki! Nanga yërëm nu ci sa yërmënde ju yaatu ja te laabal sunuy dund ci say dogal, yaw Ku Dund ki (Wers 47)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ سُبّ كِ! نَنْجَ يِٜrِٜrِمْ نُ سِ سَ يِٜrْمِينْدِ جُ يَاتُ جَ تِ لَابَلْ سُنُيْ دُنْدْ سِ سَيْ دُجَلْ يَوْ كُ دُنْدْ كِ [47]

arabicText: يَا الْمَجِيدُ ثَبِّتْ قُلُوبَنَا عَلَى الْإِيمَانِ وَأَعِزَّ مَقَامَنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ يَا رَبَّنَا [48]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Majīd thabbit qulūbanā ‘alal-īmāni wa a‘izz maqāmanā fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah yā Rabbanā (48)
englishTranslation: O The Glorious! Please make our hearts firm upon true faith and elevate our status in this world and the next, O our Lord (Stanza 48)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Ndamal ki! Nanga dëgëral sunuy xol ca ngëm te kaweal sunu daraja ca kaw suuf ak àllaxira, sunu Boroom (Wers 48)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ نْدَمَلْ كِ! نَنْجَ دِٜجِٜrَلْ سُنُيْ خُلْ سَ نْجِٜنْ تِ كُوِلْ سُنُ دَرَجَ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ سُنُ بُرُومْ [48]

arabicText: يَا الْبَاعِثُ أَحْيِ قُلُوبَنَا بِذِكْرِكَ الطَّاهِرِ وَتَوَفَّنَا عَلَى حَقِيقَةِ الْإِيمَانِ يَا اللَّهُ [49]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Bā‘ith aḥyi qulūbanā bi-dhikrikat-ṭāhiri wa tawaffanā ‘alā ḥaqīqatil-īmān yā Allāh (49)
englishTranslation: O The Infuser of Life! Please revive our hearts with Your pure remembrance and cause us to die upon the reality of faith, O Allah (Stanza 49)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Dekki ki! Nanga dundal sunuy xol ci sa tudd gu laab ga, te dee lo nu ca dëgg-dëggug ngëm, yā Yàlla (Wers 49)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ دِكِّ كِ! نَنْجَ دُنْدَلْ سُنُيْ خُلْ سِ سَ تُدْ جُ لَابْ جَ تِ دِ لُ نُ سِ دِٜجّ دِٜجُجْ نْجِٜنْ يَا يَٜلَّ [49]

arabicText: يَا الشَّهِيدُ ارْزُقْنَا عِلْمًا نَافِعًا وَوِعَاءً طَاهِرًا وَأَنِرْ بَصَائِرَنَا لِنُورِكَ بِفَضْلِكَ [50]
latinTransliteration: Yā Ash-Shahīd urzuqnā ‘ilman nāfi‘an wa wi‘ā'an ṭāhiran wa anir baṣā'iranā li-nūrik bi-faḍlik (50)
englishTranslation: O The All-Observing Witness! Please provide us with beneficial knowledge, a pure vessel, and illuminate our insights with Your Light, by Your grace (Stanza 50)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Seere ki! Nanga jox nu xam-xam buy jëriñ, lool buy laab, te leeral sunuy gisu-gisu ci sa leer, ci sa ngënel (Wers 50)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ سِيرِ كِ! نَنْجَ جُخْ نُ خَمْ خَمْ بُيْ جِرِنْ لُولْ بُيْ لَابْ تِ لِيرَلْ سُنُيْ جِسُ جِسُ سِ سَ لِيرْ سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ [50]

arabicText: يَا الْحَقُّ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا كَرِيمُ [51]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Ḥaqq anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Karīm (51)
englishTranslation: O The Absolute Truth! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O Generous (Stanza 51)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Dëgg gi! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, yaw Ku Yaatu ki (Wers 51)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ دِࣺجّ جِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ يَوْ كُ يَاتُ كِ [51]

arabicText: يَا الْوَكِيلُ احْفَظْنَا مِنْ كُلِّ سُوءٍ وَمَكْرٍ وَاكْفِنَا شَرَّ الْحَاسِدِينَ وَالْأَعْدَاءِ عَاجِلاً [52]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Wakīl iḥfaẓnā min kulli sū'in wa makrin wa-kfinā sharral-ḥāsidīna wal-a‘dā' ‘ājilan (52)
englishTranslation: O The Ultimate Trustee! Please protect us from every evil and plotting, and suffice us against the envious and adversaries, swiftly (Stanza 52)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Wolu ki! Nanga aar nu ci bépp tookoñ walla pexe, te faddal nu noon yi di nu iñaané ak mbooloo, gaaw (Wers 52)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ وُلُ كِ! نَنْجَ آرْ نُ سِ بِيقْ تُوكُنْ وَلَّ پِخِ تِ فَدَّلْ نُ نُونْ يِ دِ نُ اِنيَانِ اَكْ مْبُولُو جَاوْ [52]

arabicText: يَا الْقَوِيُّ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ بِتَيْسِيرِكَ [53]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Qawiy anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik bi-taysīrik (53)
englishTranslation: O The All-Strong! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, with Your facilitation (Stanza 53)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Doolee ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, ci sa yombal (Wers 53)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ دُولِي كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سِ سَ يُومْبَلْ [53]

arabicText: يَا الْمَتِينُ احْفَظْنَا مِنْ كُلِّ سُوءٍ وَمَكْرٍ وَاكْفِنَا شَرَّ الْحَاسِدِينَ وَالْأَعْدَاءِ يَا حَيُّ [54]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Matīn iḥfaẓnā min kulli sū'in wa makrin wa-kfinā sharral-ḥāsidīna wal-a‘dā' yā Ḥayy (54)
englishTranslation: O The Firm One! Please protect us from every evil and plotting, and suffice us against the envious and adversaries, O Ever-Living (Stanza 54)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Wër ki! Nanga aar nu ci bépp tookoñ walla pexe, te faddal nu noon yi di nu iñaané ak mbooloo, yaw Ku Dund ki (Wers 54)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ وِࣺرْ كِ! نَنْجَ آرْ نُ سِ بِيقْ تُوكُنْ وَلَّ پِخِ تِ فَدَّلْ نُ نُونْ يِ دِ نُ اِنيَانِ اَكْ مْبُولُو يَوْ كُ دُنْدْ كِ [54]

arabicText: يَا الْوَلِيُّ احْفَظْنَا مِنْ كُلِّ سُوءٍ وَمَكْرٍ وَاكْفِنَا شَرَّ الْحَاسِدِينَ وَالْأَعْدَاءِ يَا رَبَّنَا [55]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Waliy iḥfaẓnā min kulli sū'in wa makrin wa-kfinā sharral-ḥāsidīna wal-a‘dā' yā Rabbanā (55)
englishTranslation: O The Protecting Friend! Please protect us from every evil and plotting, and suffice us against the envious and adversaries, O our Lord (Stanza 55)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Aar ki! Nanga aar nu ci bépp tookoñ walla pexe, te faddal nu noon yi di nu iñaané ak mbooloo, sunu Boroom (Wers 55)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ آرْ كِ! نَنْجَ آرْ نُ سِ بِيقْ تُوكُنْ وَلَّ پِخِ تِ فَدَّلْ نُ نُونْ يِ دِ نُ اِنيَانِ اَكْ مْبُولُو سُنُ بُرُومْ [55]

arabicText: يَا الْحَمِيدُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا اللَّهُ [56]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Ḥamīd anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Allāh (56)
englishTranslation: O The All-Praiseworthy! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O Allah (Stanza 56)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Santu ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, yā Yàlla (Wers 56)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ سَنْتُ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ يَا يَٜلَّ [56]

arabicText: يَا الْمُحْصِي ارْزُقْنَا عِلْمًا نَافِعًا وَوِعَاءً طَاهِرًا وَأَنِرْ بَصَائِرَنَا لِنُورِكَ بِفَضْلِكَ [57]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Muḥṣī urzuqnā ‘ilman nāfi‘an wa wi‘ā'an ṭāhiran wa anir baṣā'iranā li-nūrik bi-faḍlik (57)
englishTranslation: O The All-Registering Appraiser! Please provide us with beneficial knowledge, a pure vessel, and illuminate our insights with Your Light, by Your grace (Stanza 57)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Lim ki! Nanga jox nu xam-xam buy jëriñ, lool buy laab, te leeral sunuy gisu-gisu ci sa leer, ci sa ngënel (Wers 57)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ لِمْ كِ! نَنْجَ جُخْ نُ خَمْ خَمْ بُيْ جِرِنْ لُولْ بُيْ لَابْ تِ لِيرَلْ سُنُيْ جِسُ جِسُ سِ سَ لِيرْ سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ [57]

arabicText: يَا الْمُبْدِئُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا كَرِيمُ [58]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Mubdi' anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Karīm (58)
englishTranslation: O The Originator! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O Generous (Stanza 58)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Sose ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, yaw Ku Yaatu ki (Wers 58)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ صُسِ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ يَوْ كُ يَاتُ كِ [58]

arabicText: يَا الْمُعِيدُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ عَاجِلاً [59]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Mu‘īd anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik ‘ājilan (59)
englishTranslation: O The Restorer! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, swiftly (Stanza 59)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Dellosal ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, gaaw (Wers 59)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ دِلُّوسَلْ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ جَاوْ [59]

arabicText: يَا الْمُحْيِي أَحْيِ قُلُوبَنَا بِذِكْرِكَ الطَّاهِرِ وَتَوَفَّنَا عَلَى حَقِيقَةِ الْإِيمَانِ بِتَيْسِيرِكَ [60]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Muḥyī aḥyi qulūbanā bi-dhikrikat-ṭāhiri wa tawaffanā ‘alā ḥaqīqatil-īmān bi-taysīrik (60)
englishTranslation: O The Giver of Life! Please revive our hearts with Your pure remembrance and cause us to die upon the reality of faith, with Your facilitation (Stanza 60)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Maye dund ki! Nanga dundal sunuy xol ci sa tudd gu laab ga, te dee lo nu ca dëgg-dëggug ngëm, ci sa yombal (Wers 60)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ مَيِ دُنْدْ كِ! نَنْجَ دُنْدَلْ سُنُيْ خُلْ سِ سَ تُدْ جُ لَابْ جَ تِ دِ لُ نُ سِ دِٜجّ دِٜجُجْ نْجِٜنْ سِ سَ يُومْبَلْ [60]

arabicText: يَا الْمُمِيتُ أَحْيِ قُلُوبَنَا بِذِكْرِكَ الطَّاهِرِ وَتَوَفَّنَا عَلَى حَقِيقَةِ الْإِيمَانِ يَا حَيُّ [61]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Mumīt aḥyi qulūbanā bi-dhikrikat-ṭāhiri wa tawaffanā ‘alā ḥaqīqatil-īmān yā Ḥayy (61)
englishTranslation: O The Creator of Death! Please revive our hearts with Your pure remembrance and cause us to die upon the reality of faith, O Ever-Living (Stanza 61)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Maye dee ki! Nanga dundal sunuy xol ci sa tudd gu laab ga, te dee lo nu ca dëgg-dëggug ngëm, yaw Ku Dund ki (Wers 61)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ مَيِ دِ كِ! نَنْجَ دُنْدَلْ سُنُيْ خُلْ سِ سَ تُدْ جُ لَابْ جَ تِ دِ لُ نُ سِ دِٜجّ دِٜجُجْ نْجِٜنْ يَوْ كُ دُنْدْ كِ [61]

arabicText: يَا الْحَيُّ أَحْيِ قُلُوبَنَا بِذِكْرِكَ الطَّاهِرِ وَتَوَفَّنَا عَلَى حَقِيقَةِ الْإِيمَانِ يَا رَبَّنَا [62]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Ḥayy aḥyi qulūbanā bi-dhikrikat-ṭāhiri wa tawaffanā ‘alā ḥaqīqatil-īmān yā Rabbanā (62)
englishTranslation: O The Ever-Living! Please revive our hearts with Your pure remembrance and cause us to die upon the reality of faith, O our Lord (Stanza 62)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Dund ki! Nanga dundal sunuy xol ci sa tudd gu laab ga, te dee lo nu ca dëgg-dëggug ngëm, sunu Boroom (Wers 62)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ دُنْدْ كِ! نَنْجَ دُنْدَلْ سُنُيْ خُلْ سِ سَ تُدْ جُ لَابْ جَ تِ دِ لُ نُ سِ دِٜجّ دِٜجُجْ نْجِٜنْ سُنُ بُرُومْ [62]

arabicText: يَا الْقَيُّومُ أَحْيِ قُلُوبَنَا بِذِكْرِكَ الطَّاهِرِ وَتَوَفَّنَا عَلَى حَقِيقَةِ الْإِيمَانِ يَا اللَّهُ [63]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Qayyūm aḥyi qulūbanā bi-dhikrikat-ṭāhiri wa tawaffanā ‘alā ḥaqīqatil-īmān yā Allāh (63)
englishTranslation: O The Self-Sustaining! Please revive our hearts with Your pure remembrance and cause us to die upon the reality of faith, O Allah (Stanza 63)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Taxawal mbir yépp! Nanga dundal sunuy xol ci sa tudd gu laab ga, te dee lo nu ca dëgg-dëggug ngëm, yā Yàlla (Wers 63)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ تَخَوَلْ مْبِرْ يِapْ! نَنْجَ دُنْدَلْ سُنُيْ خُلْ سِ سَ تُدْ جُ لَابْ جَ تِ دِ لُ نُ سِ دِٜجّ دِٜجُجْ نْجِٜنْ يَا يَٜلَّ [63]

arabicText: يَا الْوَاجِدُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ بِفَضْلِكَ [64]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Wājid anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik bi-faḍlik (64)
englishTranslation: O The Perceiver! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, by Your grace (Stanza 64)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Am ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, ci sa ngënel (Wers 64)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ اَمْ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ [64]

arabicText: يَا الْمَاجِدُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا كَرِيمُ [65]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Mājid anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Karīm (65)
englishTranslation: O The Illustrious! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O Generous (Stanza 65)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Kowe daraja ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, yaw Ku Yaatu ki (Wers 65)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ كُوِ دَرَجَ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ يَوْ كُ يَاتُ كِ [65]

arabicText: يَا الْوَاحِدُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ عَاجِلاً [66]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Wāḥid anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik ‘ājilan (66)
englishTranslation: O The Sole One! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, swiftly (Stanza 66)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Benn ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, gaaw (Wers 66)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ بِنّ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ جَاوْ [66]

arabicText: يَا الْأَحَدُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ بِتَيْسِيرِكَ [67]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Aḥad anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik bi-taysīrik (67)
englishTranslation: O The Only One! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, with Your facilitation (Stanza 67)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Kenn ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, ci sa yombal (Wers 67)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ كِنّ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سِ سَ يُومْبَلْ [67]

arabicText: يَا الصَّمَدُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا حَيُّ [68]
latinTransliteration: Yā Aṣ-Ṣamad anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Ḥayy (68)
englishTranslation: O The Supreme Provider! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O Ever-Living (Stanza 68)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Ñu Sooxla ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, yaw Ku Dund ki (Wers 68)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ نُ سُوخْلَ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ يَوْ كُ دُنْدْ كِ [68]

arabicText: يَا الْقَادِرُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا رَبَّنَا [69]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Qādir anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Rabbanā (69)
englishTranslation: O The Capable! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O our Lord (Stanza 69)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Mën ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, sunu Boroom (Wers 69)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ مِࣺنْ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سُنُ بُرُومْ [69]

arabicText: يَا الْمُقْتَدِرُ ثَبِّتْ قُلُوبَنَا عَلَى الْإِيمَانِ وَأَعِزَّ مَقَامَنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ يَا اللَّهُ [70]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Muqtadir thabbit qulūbanā ‘alal-īmāni wa a‘izz maqāmanā fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah yā Allāh (70)
englishTranslation: O The Omnipotent! Please make our hearts firm upon true faith and elevate our status in this world and the next, O Allah (Stanza 70)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Kàttanu ki! Nanga dëgëral sunuy xol ca ngëm te kaweal sunu daraja ca kaw suuf ak àllaxira, yā Yàlla (Wers 70)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ كَتَّنُ كِ! نَنْجَ دِٜجِٜrَلْ سُنُيْ خُلْ سَ نْجِٜنْ تِ كُوِلْ سُنُ دَرَجَ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ يَا يَٜلَّ [70]

arabicText: يَا الْمُقَدِّمُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ بِفَضْلِكَ [71]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Muqaddim anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik bi-faḍlik (71)
englishTranslation: O The Expediter! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, by Your grace (Stanza 71)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Jiital ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, ci sa ngënel (Wers 71)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ جِيتَلْ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ [71]

arabicText: يَا الْمُؤَخِّرُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا كَرِيمُ [72]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Mu'akhkhir anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Karīm (72)
englishTranslation: O The Delayer! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O Generous (Stanza 72)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Mujjital ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, yaw Ku Yaatu ki (Wers 72)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ مُجِّتَلْ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ يَوْ كُ يَاتُ كِ [72]

arabicText: يَا الْأَوَّلُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ عَاجِلاً [73]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Awwal anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik ‘ājilan (73)
englishTranslation: O The Very First! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, swiftly (Stanza 73)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Jëkk ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, gaaw (Wers 73)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ جِࣺكْ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ جَاوْ [73]

arabicText: يَا الْآخِرُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ بِتَيْسِيرِكَ [74]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Ākhir anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik bi-taysīrik (74)
englishTranslation: O The Infinite Last! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, with Your facilitation (Stanza 74)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Mujj ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, ci sa yombal (Wers 74)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ مُجِّ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سِ سَ يُومْبَلْ [74]

arabicText: يَا الظَّاهِرُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا حَيُّ [75]
latinTransliteration: Yā Aẓ-Ẓāhir anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Ḥayy (75)
englishTranslation: O The Manifest! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O Ever-Living (Stanza 75)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Féeñ ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, yaw Ku Dund ki (Wers 75)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ فِيرْ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ يَوْ كُ دُنْدْ كِ [75]

arabicText: يَا الْبَاطِنُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا رَبَّنَا [76]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Bāṭin anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Rabbanā (76)
englishTranslation: O The Hidden! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O our Lord (Stanza 76)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Nebu ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, sunu Boroom (Wers 76)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ نِبُ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سُنُ بُرُومْ [76]

arabicText: يَا الْوَالِي انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا اللَّهُ [77]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Wālī anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Allāh (77)
englishTranslation: O The Patron! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O Allah (Stanza 77)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Boroom Réew mi! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, yā Yàlla (Wers 77)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ بُرُومْ رِيوْ مِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ يَا يَٜلَّ [77]

arabicText: يَا الْمُتَعَالِي انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ بِفَضْلِكَ [78]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Muta‘ālī anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik bi-faḍlik (78)
englishTranslation: O The Self-Exalted! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, by Your grace (Stanza 78)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Kawe daraja ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, ci sa ngënel (Wers 78)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ كَوِ دَرَجَ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ [78]

arabicText: يَا الْبَرُّ ارْحَمْنَا بِرَحْمَتِكَ الْوَاسِعَةِ وَأَلْطُفْ بِنَا فِي الْقَضَاءِ وَالْأَقْدَارِ يَا كَرِيمُ [79]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Barr irḥamnā bi-raḥmatikal-wāsi'ati wal-ṭuf binā fīl-qaḍā'i wal-aqdār yā Karīm (79)
englishTranslation: O The Most Kind and Righteous! Please have mercy on us with Your vast mercy and show us gentleness in divine decrees and destiny, O Generous (Stanza 79)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Baax ki! Nanga yërëm nu ci sa yërmënde ju yaatu ja te laabal sunuy dund ci say dogal, yaw Ku Yaatu ki (Wers 79)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ بَآخْ كِ! نَنْجَ يِٜrِٜrِمْ نُ سِ سَ يِٜrْمِينْدِ جُ يَاتُ جَ تِ لَابَلْ سُنُيْ دُنْدْ سِ سَيْ دُجَلْ يَوْ كُ يَاتُ كِ [79]

arabicText: يَا التَّوَّابُ اغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا كُلَّهَا وَتُبْ عَلَيْنَا تَوْبَةً نَصُوحًا تُرْضِيكَ عَاجِلاً [80]
latinTransliteration: Yā At-Tawwāb ighfir lanā dhunūbanā kullahā wa tub ‘alaynā tawbatan naṣūḥan turḍīk ‘ājilan (80)
englishTranslation: O The Ever-Acceptor of Repentance! Please forgive all of our sins and grant us a sincere repentance that is pleasing to You, swiftly (Stanza 80)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Tuubal nangu ki! Nanga jegal sunuy bàkkar yépp te tuubal nu tuub gu sell gu lay neex, gaaw (Wers 80)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ تُوبَلْ نَنْجُ كِ! نَنْجَ جِجَلْ سُنُيْ بَكَّرْ يِٜپْ تِ تُوبَلْ نُ تُوبْ جُ سِلْ جُ لَيْ نِوخْ جَاوْ [80]

arabicText: يَا الْمُنْتَقِمُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ بِتَيْسِيرِكَ [81]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Muntaqim anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik bi-taysīrik (81)
englishTranslation: O The Avenger! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, with Your facilitation (Stanza 81)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Feyyu ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, ci sa yombal (Wers 81)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ فِيُّ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سِ سَ يُومْبَلْ [81]

arabicText: يَا الْعَفُوُّ اغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا كُلَّهَا وَتُبْ عَلَيْنَا تَوْبَةً نَصُوحًا تُرْضِيكَ يَا حَيُّ [82]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-‘Afuw ighfir lanā dhunūbanā kullahā wa tub ‘alaynā tawbatan naṣūḥan turḍīk yā Ḥayy (82)
englishTranslation: O The Pardoner! Please forgive all of our sins and grant us a sincere repentance that is pleasing to You, O Ever-Living (Stanza 82)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Jegale nangu ki! Nanga jegal sunuy bàkkar yépp te tuubal nu tuub gu sell gu lay neex, yaw Ku Dund ki (Wers 82)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ جِجَلِ نَنْجُ كِ! نَنْجَ جِجَلْ سُنُيْ بَكَّرْ يِٜپْ تِ تُوبَلْ نُ تُوبْ جُ سِلْ جُ لَيْ نِوخْ يَوْ كُ دُنْدْ كِ [82]

arabicText: يَا الرَّؤُوفُ ارْحَمْنَا بِرَحْمَتِكَ الْوَاسِعَةِ وَأَلْطُفْ بِنَا فِي الْقَضَاءِ وَالْأَقْدَارِ يَا رَبَّنَا [83]
latinTransliteration: Yā Ar-Ra'ūf irḥamnā bi-raḥmatikal-wāsi'ati wal-ṭuf binā fīl-qaḍā'i wal-aqdār yā Rabbanā (83)
englishTranslation: O The Most Compassionate! Please have mercy on us with Your vast mercy and show us gentleness in divine decrees and destiny, O our Lord (Stanza 83)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Yëreem lool ki! Nanga yërëm nu ci sa yërmënde ju yaatu ja te laabal sunuy dund ci say dogal, sunu Boroom (Wers 83)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ يِࣺرِيمْ لُولْ كِ! نَنْجَ يِٜrِٜrِمْ نُ سِ سَ يِٜrْمِينْدِ جُ يَاتُ جَ تِ لَابَلْ سُنُيْ دُنْدْ سِ سَيْ دُجَلْ سُنُ بُرُومْ [83]

arabicText: يَا مَالِكُ الْمُلْكِ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا اللَّهُ [84]
latinTransliteration: Yā Mālikul-Mulk anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Allāh (84)
englishTranslation: O Owner of All Sovereignty! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O Allah (Stanza 84)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Buuru Buur yi! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, yā Yàlla (Wers 84)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ بُورُ بُورْ يِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ يَا يَٜلَّ [84]

arabicText: يَا ذُو الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ بِفَضْلِكَ [85]
latinTransliteration: Yā Dhūl-Jalāli wal-Ikrām anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik bi-faḍlik (85)
englishTranslation: O Owner of Majesty and Honor! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, by Your grace (Stanza 85)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Boroom Ndam ak Ngënel! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, ci sa ngënel (Wers 85)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ بُرُومْ نْدَمْ اَكْ نْجِࣺنِلْ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ [85]

arabicText: يَا الْمُقْسِطُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا كَرِيمُ [86]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Muqsiṭ anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Karīm (86)
englishTranslation: O The Just Equitable! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O Generous (Stanza 86)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Jub lool ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, yaw Ku Yaatu ki (Wers 86)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ جُبْ لُولْ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ يَوْ كُ يَاتُ كِ [86]

arabicText: يَا الْجَامِعُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ عَاجِلاً [87]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Jāmi‘ anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik ‘ājilan (87)
englishTranslation: O The Gatherer! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, swiftly (Stanza 87)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Boole ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, gaaw (Wers 87)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ بُولِ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ جَاوْ [87]

arabicText: يَا الْغَنِيُّ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ بِتَيْسِيرِكَ [88]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Ghaniy anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik bi-taysīrik (88)
englishTranslation: O The Self-Sufficient! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, with Your facilitation (Stanza 88)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Woomle ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, ci sa yombal (Wers 88)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ وُومْلِ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سِ سَ يُومْبَلْ [88]

arabicText: يَا الْمُغْنِي ارْزُقْنَا رِزْقًا حَلَالًا طَيِّبًا وَافْتَحْ لَنَا أَبْوَابَ الْفَضْلِ وَالْجُودِ يَا حَيُّ [89]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Mughnī urzuqnā rizqan ḥalālan ṭayyiban wa-ftaḥ lanā abwābal-faḍli wal-jūd yā Ḥayy (89)
englishTranslation: O The Enricher! Please grant us pure, lawful sustenance and open for us the gates of favor and generosity, O Ever-Living (Stanza 89)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Alalle ki! Nanga wërsëgal nu dund gu dagan te rafet, te ubbil nu bunt yu baax ak ngënel, yaw Ku Dund ki (Wers 89)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ اَلَلِ كِ! نَنْجَ وِٜrْسِجَلْ نُ دُنْدْ جُ دَجَنَّ تِ رَفِتْ تِ أُبِّلْ نُ بُنْتْ يُ بَآخْ اَكْ نْجِنِلْ يَوْ كُ دُنْدْ كِ [89]

arabicText: يَا الْمَانِعُ احْفَظْنَا مِنْ كُلِّ سُوءٍ وَمَكْرٍ وَاكْفِنَا شَرَّ الْحَاسِدِينَ وَالْأَعْدَاءِ يَا رَبَّنَا [90]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Māni‘ iḥfaẓnā min kulli sū'in wa makrin wa-kfinā sharral-ḥāsidīna wal-a‘dā' yā Rabbanā (90)
englishTranslation: O The Withholder! Please protect us from every evil and plotting, and suffice us against the envious and adversaries, O our Lord (Stanza 90)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Fadd ki! Nanga aar nu ci bépp tookoñ walla pexe, te faddal nu noon yi di nu iñaané ak mbooloo, sunu Boroom (Wers 90)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ فَدْ كِ! نَنْجَ آرْ نُ سِ بِيقْ تُوكُنْ وَلَّ پِخِ تِ فَدَّلْ نُ نُونْ يِ دِ نُ اِنيَانِ اَكْ مْبُولُو سُنُ بُرُومْ [90]

arabicText: يَا الضَّارُّ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا اللَّهُ [91]
latinTransliteration: Yā Aḍ-Ḍārr anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Allāh (91)
englishTranslation: O The Distresser! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O Allah (Stanza 91)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Loral ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, yā Yàlla (Wers 91)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ لُرَلْ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ يَا يَٜلَّ [91]

arabicText: يَا النَّافِعُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ بِفَضْلِكَ [92]
latinTransliteration: Yā An-Nāfi‘ anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik bi-faḍlik (92)
englishTranslation: O The Propitious Benefactor! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, by Your grace (Stanza 92)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Jeriñ ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, ci sa ngënel (Wers 92)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ جِرِنْ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ [92]

arabicText: يَا النُّورُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا كَرِيمُ [93]
latinTransliteration: Yā An-Nūr anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Karīm (93)
englishTranslation: O The Prime Light! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O Generous (Stanza 93)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Leeraay bi! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, yaw Ku Yaatu ki (Wers 93)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ لِيرَايْ بِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ يَوْ كُ يَاتُ كِ [93]

arabicText: يَا الْهَادِي اهْدِنَا إِلَى صِرَاطِكَ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ وَأَعِنَّا عَلَى اتِّبَاعِ الْحَقِّ وَالْعَدْلِ عَاجِلاً [94]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Hādī ihdinā ilā ṣirāṭikal-mustaqīmi wa a‘innā ‘alā-ttibā‘il-ḥaqqi wal-‘adl ‘ājilan (94)
englishTranslation: O The Guide! Please guide us to Your straight path and aid us in following truth and absolute justice, swiftly (Stanza 94)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Gindi ki! Nanga gindi nu ca sa yoon wu jub wa te dëgëral nu ca topp dëgg ak jub, gaaw (Wers 94)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ جِنْدِ كِ! نَنْجَ جِنْدِ نُ سَ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ تِ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نُ سَ تُpْ دِٜجّ اَكْ جُبْ جَاوْ [94]

arabicText: يَا الْبَدِيعُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ بِتَيْسِيرِكَ [95]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Badī‘ anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik bi-taysīrik (95)
englishTranslation: O The Unparalleled Originator! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, with Your facilitation (Stanza 95)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Sose lool ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, ci sa yombal (Wers 95)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ صُسِ لُولْ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سِ سَ يُومْبَلْ [95]

arabicText: يَا الْبَاقِي انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا حَيُّ [96]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Bāqī anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Ḥayy (96)
englishTranslation: O The Ever-Enduring! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O Ever-Living (Stanza 96)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Des ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, yaw Ku Dund ki (Wers 96)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ دِسْ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ يَوْ كُ دُنْدْ كِ [96]

arabicText: يَا الْوَارِثُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا رَبَّنَا [97]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Wārith anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Rabbanā (97)
englishTranslation: O The Ultimate Inheritor! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O our Lord (Stanza 97)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ki Donn ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, sunu Boroom (Wers 97)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كِ دُنّ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سُنُ بُرُومْ [97]

arabicText: يَا الرَّشِيدُ اهْدِنَا إِلَى صِرَاطِكَ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ وَأَعِنَّا عَلَى اتِّبَاعِ الْحَقِّ وَالْعَدْلِ يَا اللَّهُ [98]
latinTransliteration: Yā Ar-Rashīd ihdinā ilā ṣirāṭikal-mustaqīmi wa a‘innā ‘alā-ttibā‘il-ḥaqqi wal-‘adl yā Allāh (98)
englishTranslation: O The Guide to the Right Path! Please guide us to Your straight path and aid us in following truth and absolute justice, O Allah (Stanza 98)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Jubbël ki! Nanga gindi nu ca sa yoon wu jub wa te dëgëral nu ca topp dëgg ak jub, yā Yàlla (Wers 98)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ جُبِّلْ كِ! نَنْجَ جِنْدِ نُ سَ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ تِ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نُ سَ تُpْ دِٜجّ اَكْ جُبْ يَا يَٜلَّ [98]

arabicText: يَا الصَّبُورُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ بِفَضْلِكَ [99]
latinTransliteration: Yā Aṣ-Ṣabūr anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik bi-faḍlik (99)
englishTranslation: O The Extremely Patient! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, by Your grace (Stanza 99)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Muñ lool ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, ci sa ngënel (Wers 99)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ مُنْ لُولْ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ [99]

arabicText: يَا الرَّحْمَنُ ارْحَمْنَا بِرَحْمَتِكَ الْوَاسِعَةِ وَأَلْطُفْ بِنَا فِي الْقَضَاءِ وَالْأَقْدَارِ يَا كَرِيمُ [100]
latinTransliteration: Yā Ar-Raḥmān irḥamnā bi-raḥmatikal-wāsi'ati wal-ṭuf binā fīl-qaḍā'i wal-aqdār yā Karīm (100)
englishTranslation: O The Beneficent! Please have mercy on us with Your vast mercy and show us gentleness in divine decrees and destiny, O Generous (Stanza 100)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Yëreem ki! Nanga yërëm nu ci sa yërmënde ju yaatu ja te laabal sunuy dund ci say dogal, yaw Ku Yaatu ki (Wers 100)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ يِࣺرِيمْ كِ! نَنْجَ يِٜrِٜrِمْ نُ سِ سَ يِٜrْمِينْدِ جُ يَاتُ جَ تِ لَابَلْ سُنُيْ دُنْدْ سِ سَيْ دُجَلْ يَوْ كُ يَاتُ كِ [100]

arabicText: يَا الرَّحِيمُ ارْحَمْنَا بِرَحْمَتِكَ الْوَاسِعَةِ وَأَلْطُفْ بِنَا فِي الْقَضَاءِ وَالْأَقْدَارِ عَاجِلاً [101]
latinTransliteration: Yā Ar-Raḥīm irḥamnā bi-raḥmatikal-wāsi'ati wal-ṭuf binā fīl-qaḍā'i wal-aqdār ‘ājilan (101)
englishTranslation: O The Merciful! Please have mercy on us with Your vast mercy and show us gentleness in divine decrees and destiny, swiftly (Stanza 101)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Boroom yërmënde ju yaatu ja! Nanga yërëm nu ci sa yërmënde ju yaatu ja te laabal sunuy dund ci say dogal, gaaw (Wers 101)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ بُرُومْ يِࣺرْمِينْدِ جُ يَاتُ جَ! نَنْجَ يِٜrِٜrِمْ نُ سِ سَ يِٜrْمِينْدِ جُ يَاتُ جَ تِ لَابَلْ سُنُيْ دُنْدْ سِ سَيْ دُجَلْ جَاوْ [101]

arabicText: يَا الْمَلِكُ ثَبِّتْ قُلُوبَنَا عَلَى الْإِيمَانِ وَأَعِزَّ مَقَامَنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ بِتَيْسِيرِكَ [102]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Malik thabbit qulūbanā ‘alal-īmāni wa a‘izz maqāmanā fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah bi-taysīrik (102)
englishTranslation: O The King! Please make our hearts firm upon true faith and elevate our status in this world and the next, with Your facilitation (Stanza 102)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Buur bi! Nanga dëgëral sunuy xol ca ngëm te kaweal sunu daraja ca kaw suuf ak àllaxira, ci sa yombal (Wers 102)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ بُورْ بِ! نَنْجَ دِٜجِٜrَلْ سُنُيْ خُلْ سَ نْجِٜنْ تِ كُوِلْ سُنُ دَرَجَ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ سِ سَ يُومْبَلْ [102]

arabicText: يَا الْقُدُّوسُ ثَبِّتْ قُلُوبَنَا عَلَى الْإِيمَانِ وَأَعِزَّ مَقَامَنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ يَا حَيُّ [103]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Quddūs thabbit qulūbanā ‘alal-īmāni wa a‘izz maqāmanā fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah yā Ḥayy (103)
englishTranslation: O The Most Sacred! Please make our hearts firm upon true faith and elevate our status in this world and the next, O Ever-Living (Stanza 103)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Sell ki! Nanga dëgëral sunuy xol ca ngëm te kaweal sunu daraja ca kaw suuf ak àllaxira, yaw Ku Dund ki (Wers 103)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ سِلْ كِ! نَنْجَ دِٜجِٜrَلْ سُنُيْ خُلْ سَ نْجِٜنْ تِ كُوِلْ سُنُ دَرَجَ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ يَوْ كُ دُنْدْ كِ [103]

arabicText: يَا السَّلَامُ انْشُرْ عَلَيْنَا أَنْوَارَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَفُكَّ قُيُودَ نُفُوسِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا رَبَّنَا [104]
latinTransliteration: Yā As-Salām anshur ‘alaynā anwāral-ma‘rifeti wa fukka quyūda nufūsinā bi-faḍlik yā Rabbanā (104)
englishTranslation: O The Source of Peace! Please spread upon us the lights of gnosis and unshackle our souls by Your grace, O our Lord (Stanza 104)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku Jamu ki! Nanga siiral ci nun leeraayi xam-xam te fari ay dëngëli sunuy ruu ci sa ngënel, sunu Boroom (Wers 104)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ جَمُ كِ! نَنْجَ سِيرَلْ سِ نُنْ لِيرَايِ خَمْ خَمْ تِ فَرِ اَيْ دِٜنْجِلِ سُنُيْ رُو سِ سَ نْجِنِلْ سُنُ بُرُومْ [104]

arabicText: يَا الْمُؤْمِنُ احْفَظْنَا مِنْ كُلِّ سُوءٍ وَمَكْرٍ وَاكْفِنَا شَرَّ الْحَاسِدِينَ وَالْأَعْدَاءِ يَا اللَّهُ [105]
latinTransliteration: Yā Al-Mu'min iḥfaẓnā min kulli sū'in wa makrin wa-kfinā sharral-ḥāsidīna wal-a‘dā' yā Allāh (105)
englishTranslation: O Inspirer of Faith! Please protect us from every evil and plotting, and suffice us against the envious and adversaries, O Allah (Stanza 105)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Ku dëgëral ngëm gi! Nanga aar nu ci bépp tookoñ walla pexe, te faddal nu noon yi di nu iñaané ak mbooloo, yā Yàlla (Wers 105)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ كُ دِࣺجِࣺرَلْ نْجِࣺمْ جِ! نَنْجَ آرْ نُ سِ بِيقْ تُوكُنْ وَلَّ پِخِ تِ فَدَّلْ نُ نُونْ يِ دِ نُ اِنيَانِ اَكْ مْبُولُو يَا يَٜلَّ [105]
